items.title: Whale swims off sandbank after big German rescue effort on Baltic coast
items.dek: Rescue teams now hope the whale will swim out of the shallow waters of Lübeck Bay and into the wider sea.
items.body: Rescue teams now hope the whale will swim out of the shallow waters of Lübeck Bay and into the wider sea.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Rawalpindi Bride arrested for aerial firing at her wedding
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Women secretly filmed, then ridiculed and abused online
items.dek: Women in Kenya and Ghana tell the BBC about being approached by a Russian man who later posts videos of them without their consent.
items.body: Women in Kenya and Ghana tell the BBC about being approached by a Russian man who later posts videos of them without their consent.
items.author: IriLine Desk
